interface.shortDescription: Connects Codex to MemForge hooks and MCP memory tools.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to a local or cloud MemForge instance. Hooks receive compact memory context and submit bounded agent-session windows, while bundled MCP tools support explicit memory search facets, memory detail lookup, and source artifact retrieval.
defaultPrompt: Use MemForge memory before editing this repo.
Check recent memory changes for this project.
Submit a session summary to MemForge.
